# DaDa Voice Museum (灰妲語音博物館)

> Fan-made voice button site for Taiwanese Vtuber DaDa (灰妲 / フイダ),
> ReLive Project affiliate. 937 voice clips across 52 stream categories.

## About DaDa

- Full names: 灰妲 (zh) / フイダ (ja) / DaDa or Gray Da (en)
- Affiliation: ReLive Project (https://relive-project0.com/)
- Debut: 2021-03-26
- Genre: Vtuber, gaming, chat, comedy, karaoke
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ReLiveDaDa
- X: https://x.com/DadaRelive

## Site purpose

Browse and play short voice clips sliced from DaDa's public YouTube
livestream archives. Audience: viewers of Vtuber content, audio drama
fans, and entertainment/comedy YouTube fans looking for soundboard-style
fan engagement. Supports three languages: zh-TW (default), ja-JP, en-US.

## Sections

- / — Full voice library, browse by stream category (52 groups, 937 clips)
- /challenge — Voice attribution quiz game ("DaDa Challenge")
- /favorite — User-saved clips (stored locally in browser)
- /privacy — Privacy policy

## URL conventions

- Default locale (zh-TW): no prefix — e.g. /favorite
- Japanese (ja-JP): /ja prefix — e.g. /ja/favorite
- English (en-US): /en prefix — e.g. /en/favorite

## Not affiliated

Fan project, not associated with ReLive Project or DaDa officially.
Maintained by @tn604000 (https://x.com/tn604000).
Source code: https://github.com/silentvow/dada-vtuber-button (MIT licensed).
Voice clips are excerpts from publicly available streams,
used under fair use for fan engagement.
